name: Centennial Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:45
1. Combine 1/4 cup powdered sugar, 1/8 teaspoon salt and flour; mix well. Work in 1/2 cup margarine. Press mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes. Remove from the oven.
3. Combine 1 cup regular sugar, baking powder and remaining 1/8 teaspoon salt. Blend in slightly beaten eggs, 4 tablespoons lemon juice and lemon rind. Spread over baked mixture. Return to oven. Bake for 20 minutes longer. Remove from the oven and cool completely.
4. Combine remaining 3/4 cup powdered sugar, remaining 4 tablespoons lemon juice and 1 tablespoon margarine. Spread over lemon mixture. Cut into squares to serve.
